outline.summary: The simulation reveals that the announcement of an IMF program review conditional on meeting six-month fiscal targets triggers varied reactions across different agent profiles, leading to increased volatility in social media sentiment towards the Argentine peso.
outline.title: Social Media Reactions to Argentina Peso Float and IMF Program Review

data.simulation_requirement: Simulate social media reactions to Argentina peso float and IMF programme: how do different agent profiles (retail savers, institutional investors, FX traders, exporters, international creditors, IMF analysts) react, post, and interact on financial Twitter over 3 rounds given the inject variable: IMF programme review passes conditional on 6-month fiscal targets being met
